rulings.Case Title: OLMSTEAD VS ATLANTIC MUTUAL CO
rulings.Rulings: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE GRANTED. DEFENDANT ORDERED TO PROPERLY RESPOND TO WAGE GARNISHMENT IN 10 DAYS PLUS COURT AWARDS $1,000.00 FEES. IF COMPLIANCE NOT COMPLETED IN TEN DAYS DEFENDANT CAN MOVE FOR ADDITIONAL MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR CONTEMPT OF COURT. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: HERSHIPS VS NIEMIER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Enter Settlement Agreement And Enforce The Judgment Pursuant To 664.6 C.C.P.
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT ON FOLLOWING GROUNDS: DEFENDANT MAY NOT LOCK HERSHIPS OUT OF BASEMENT OR TURN OFF ELECTRICITY IN BASEMENT AND MUST RESTORE TOILET AND SINK IN BASEMENT. (KS(EX))

rulings.Case Title: SAKS & CO VS LEVACHOV
rulings.Rulings: Deny Motion for Summary Judgment. Triable issue of fact whether plaintiff can establish cause of action for account stated. Deny Motion for Summary Adjudication because procedurally infirm. (AJR/pb)

rulings.Case Title: DE ETTA NICHOLS VS. A P GREEN
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO TAX GRANTED AS TO SERVICE OF PROCESS FEE TO REDUCE TO $10. HEARING REQUIRED RE MOTION TO TAX AS TO DEPOSITION COSTS AND FILING FEE. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE AT HEARING NAMES OF DEPONENTS WHICH WERE RELEVANT TO PROSECUTION ACTION OF DEER ACTION OTHERWISE COURT WILL GRANT MOTION TO TAX - IN ADDITION PLAINTIFF TO SUPPLY MOTION COSTS ATTRIBUTABLE TO DEER. (AA)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT SETO et al VS. THE MEDLIN REAL ESTATE LAW GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Not Of Mot And Mot To Stay Action; Mp&As; Decl
rulings.Rulings: COURT ON OWN MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP 1048 SEVERS MALICIOUS PROSECUTION CLAIM FROM CONSOLIDATED CASES 319413 AND 324417 AND CONSOLIDATES SAID CLAIM FOR MALICIOUS PROSECUTION WITH THE INSTANT ACTION 407612. COURT THEN STAYS NEWLY CONSOLIDATED MALICIOUS PROSECUTION CASES TO PERMIT RESOLUTION OF UNDERLYING BREACH OF CONTRACT ACTION. (PB)
